name: Status_Effects

rows.Description: Units on Fire take 1 damage at the start of every turn
The affected unit is invincible but unable to move or attack. Any damage will free the unit
Weapon damage against this unit is doubled. All other damage (Push, Blocking, Fire, etc.) is unaffected
rows.Notes: Caused by tiles coated in acid, as well as various weapons.A.C.I.D. does apply to self-damage from weapons likeUnstable Cannon.Also doubles the increased damage taken resulting from a Boosted attacker.

rows.Description: Units in Smoke cannot attack or repair
rows.Notes: Can be caused by directly damaging aSand Tile(push damage won't cause Smoke).Any attacking enemy unit that ends its turn on a Smoke Tile will have its attack cancelled.Smoke does not prevent explosions,Vekspawns and death-effects like one thatArachnid Psiongrants.

rows.Description: Webbed units cannot move, but they can still attack
rows.Notes: Webbed units will break free if they can somehowmoveaway from their current tile or their captor's attack is cancelled. Examples include pushing into an empty tile (even if captor also moves in the same direction), dashing etc.Teleporterand similar weapons do NOT remove Webbed status.

rows.Description: Incoming weapon damage is reduced by 1. All other damage (Push, Blocking, Fire, etc.) is unaffected
rows.Notes: Multiple instances of Armored on the same unit (e.g.Abe Isamupiloting aJudo Mech) are redundant.

rows.Description: Shields block damage and any negative effects (Fire, Freezing, A.C.I.D, etc.). Only direct damage will remove the Shield.
The weapon or environment effect on this tile will kill any unit. Shields and Ice will not block.
Cannot be moved by any weapon effect (Push, Teleport, etc.).
rows.Notes: Stable units can't be pushed into other units to cause Push damage, but pushing other units into them will work as expected.

rows.Description: On their next action, unit's weapons will do +1 Damage or Healing.
rows.Notes: Boosted, just like Corroding A.C.I.D., affects self-damage.Deployable and spawned units likeLight TankorArachnoidare unaffected.

rows.Description: Unit is infected with Vek Mites. Damage, fire, A.C.I.D., freezing, or repairing will remove them
rows.Notes: Only appears inKnock Mites off the Mechsmission objectives. Removing all three grants 1reputation.

Status Effects
Status Effects
are a variety of negative effects that can be applied to units in
Into The Breach
.
Description
[
]
List Of Status Effects
[
]
Effect
Description
Notes
Fire
Units on Fire take 1 damage at the start of every turn
See related article
Frozen
The affected unit is invincible but unable to move or attack. Any damage will free the unit
See related article
Corroding A.C.I.D.
Weapon damage against this unit is doubled. All other damage (Push, Blocking, Fire, etc.) is unaffected
Caused by tiles coated in acid, as well as various weapons.
A.C.I.D. does apply to self-damage from weapons like
Unstable Cannon
.
Also doubles the increased damage taken resulting from a Boosted attacker.
Smoke
Units in Smoke cannot attack or repair
Can be caused by directly damaging a
Sand Tile
(push damage won't cause Smoke).
Any attacking enemy unit that ends its turn on a Smoke Tile will have its attack cancelled.
Smoke does not prevent explosions,
Vek
spawns and death-effects like one that
Arachnid Psion
grants.
Webbed
Webbed units cannot move, but they can still attack
Webbed units will break free if they can somehow
move
away from their current tile or their captor's attack is cancelled. Examples include pushing into an empty tile (even if captor also moves in the same direction), dashing etc.
Teleporter
and similar weapons do NOT remove Webbed status.
Armored
Incoming weapon damage is reduced by 1. All other damage (Push, Blocking, Fire, etc.) is unaffected
Multiple instances of Armored on the same unit (e.g.
Abe Isamu
piloting a
Judo Mech
) are redundant.
Energy Shield
Shields block damage and any negative effects (Fire, Freezing, A.C.I.D, etc.). Only direct damage will remove the Shield.
See related article
Deadly Threat
The weapon or environment effect on this tile will kill any unit. Shields and Ice will not block.
Stable
Cannot be moved by any weapon effect (Push, Teleport, etc.).
Stable units can't be pushed into other units to cause Push damage, but pushing other units into them will work as expected.
Boosted
On their next action, unit's weapons will do +1 Damage or Healing.
Boosted, just like Corroding A.C.I.D., affects self-damage.
Deployable and spawned units like
Light Tank
or
Arachnoid
are unaffected.
Vek Mites
Unit is infected with Vek Mites. Damage, fire, A.C.I.D., freezing, or repairing will remove them
Only appears in
Knock Mites off the Mechs
mission objectives. Removing all three grants 1
reputation.
